basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIIRNCD Project Research Scientist – II Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research (ICMR NIIRNCD)
basic_details.short_information: ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research (ICMR NIIRNCD) Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website niirncd.icmr.org.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICMR NIIRNCD Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per ICMR / DoPT norms for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/Ex-servicemen etc.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Clinical Psychology / Cognitive & Neuroscience / Psychology / Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Sociology / Microbiology / Biochemistry / Epidemiology with 3 years experience or PhD
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree in Clinical Psychology / Cognitive & Neuroscience / Psychology / Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Sociology / Microbiology / Biochemistry / Epidemiology with 3 years' post-qualification experience or Postgraduate degree in Clinical Psychology / Cognitive & Neuroscience / Psychology / Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Sociology / Microbiology / Biochemistry / Epidemiology with PhD.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the ICMR NIIRNCD recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) post is scheduled for 07 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree in relevant fields like Clinical Psychology, Public Health, or Epidemiology with 3 years of experience, or a PhD in the same disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 67,000/- per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist – II (Non-Medical) position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research, Jodhpur, Rajasthan. The exact venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. A duly filled application form might also be required.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual position. The job type is specified as contractual.
